  • 2015 Pizza Today Top 100 Pizza Companies List

PizzaToday

2015 Pizza Today Top 100 Pizza Companies List

By Pizza Today

Below is a ranking of America’s 100 largest pizza chains. For more on Pizza Today’s pizza industry lists, visit: Rankings of America’s Top Pizza Companies and Independent Pizzerias.

2015 Restaurant Name 2014 Principal Executive City & State #Units 2015 Gross Sales
1 Pizza Hut* 1 David W. Gibbs Plano, TX 15605 $13,400,000,000
2 Domino’s* 2 J. Patrick Doyle Ann Arbor, MI 11629 $8,900,000,000
3 Little Caesars Pizza 3 Michael Ilitch Detroit, MI 4059 $3,400,000,000
. Papa Johns’ International 4 John Schnatter Louisville, KY 4708 $3,332,000,000
. Papa Murphy’s International* 5 Ken Calwell Vancouver, WA 1425 $785,360,000
. California Pizza Kitchen* 6 G.J. Hart Playa Vista, CA 290 $745,000,000
7 Sbarro* 7 J. David Karam Columbus, OH 820 $602,000,000
. CiCi’s Pizza* 8 Darin Harris Coppell, TX 519 $475,000,000
. Chuck E. Cheese’s* 9 Thomas Leverton Irving, TX 577 $405,000,000
. Marco’s Pizza 12 John Butorac Toledo, OH 640 $380,000,000
11 Round Table Pizza* 10 Rob McCourt Concord, CA 439 $378,000,000
12 Jet’s Pizza 14 John Jetts Sterling Heights, MI 375 $337,069,011
13 Hungry Howie’s Pizza 13 Steven E. Jackson Madison Heights, MI 351 $337,069,011
14 Godfather’s Pizza* 11 Robert Gartlan Omaha, NE 620 $325,600,000
15 Old Chicago/Rock Bottom Restaurant* 15 Mike Mrlik Louisville, CO 96 $320,200,000
16 Pizza Ranch 17 Adrie Groeneweg Orange City, IA 190 $230,274,000
17 Uno Chicago Grill* 16 Aaron D. Spencer West Roxbury, MA 149 $210,500,000
